methodology.verdict: Authored rankings and claims are evidence, not a scored consensus model.
notes: Keep authored media, player, creator, caster, and coach evidence separate from fan/community consensus, objective stats, and formal honors.
Do not aggregate across source families until the site has a product surface that can show caveats beside every source.
Video and podcast sources require stable URLs plus timestamped transcript or hand-verified quote before they become seeded evidence.

sources.title: Top 10 greatest Call of Duty players of all time
sources.author: Brian Bencomo
sources.methodology_summary: Greatness list weighted by tournament wins, Champs titles, Champs top-three finishes, and individual accolades.
caveats: Retrospective list as of the end of the Vanguard season.
Mixes resume, Champs, and individual accolades; not a pure skill list.

sources.title: Top 10 best Call of Duty players of all time
sources.author: Jacob Hale
sources.methodology_summary: All-time list weighing event wins, world championship rings, raw talent, and intangibles.
caveats: Retrospective list before the Modern Warfare II season.
Uses a mixed greatness definition rather than one explicit formula.

sources.title: Top 10 BEST Players of All Time
sources.author: Arran Francis
sources.methodology_summary: Historical all-time list through June 2018, based on skill, accolades, and wider contribution, with Champs rings not weighted especially heavily.
caveats: Historical snapshot before the Black Ops 4 and CDL eras.
Hosted as a wiki article but should be treated as authored opinion, not wiki fact.

sources.title: Nadeshot gives his take on whether Scump is the COD GOAT
sources.author: Ryan Lemay
sources.methodology_summary: Reported claim from Nadeshot's 100 Thieves Cast discussion, emphasizing Scump's talent, map impact, context, and difficulty to kill.
caveats: Reported and quoted from a podcast discussion; preserve claimant and context.
This is an explicit endorsement, not a ranked list.

sources.title: Top 20 Players of MW3 article series
sources.author: EasyMac
sources.methodology_summary: Title-season Top 20 article series with player-specific rationale and stat context.
caveats: Seed only after all 20 ranks are extracted from stable article URLs.
Do not mix title-season ranks with all-time greatness lists.

sources.title: Top 20 Players of Black Ops 6 article series
sources.author: EasyMac
sources.methodology_summary: Title-season Top 20 article series with player-specific rationale and stat context.
caveats: Seed only after all 20 ranks are extracted from stable article URLs.
Do not mix title-season ranks with all-time greatness lists.

sources.title: TacticalRab GOAT/player debate videos
sources.author: TacticalRab
sources.methodology_summary: Creator/video leads for GOAT and player-ranking discussion.
caveats: Needs specific video URLs, timestamps, and transcript or hand-verified quote before scoring or display.

sources.title: The Flank, Reverse Sweep, and player-podcast ranking claims
sources.methodology_summary: Podcast/video leads for player, caster, and coach claims.
caveats: Needs stable episode URL, timestamp, speaker identity, and transcript or hand-verified quote.
Discussion segments should be labeled as discussion rather than formal ranking unless the source presents a ranked list.

claims.rationale_summary: Nadeshot frames Scump's GOAT case around talent, map impact, difficulty to kill, and roster/context disadvantages rather than only trophies.
claims.quote: best and most talented player of all time
claims.quote_location: Dexerto article body quoting 100 Thieves Cast
